packageRules.description: Auto-merge leartech-gate image bumps as soon as they land. The catalog's qa-gate task is the consumer; bumping it makes new gate behaviour roll out across both gsm + akv clusters within minutes. 'at any time' overrides the default Monday-only schedule because gate fixes (e.g. multi-doc YAML parser, post-deploy quill) need to flow through fast.
Auto-merge playwright-runner image bumps as soon as they land. arrivals-observer's dispatched Jobs use this image; bumping it picks up new browser/SDK versions used by post-deploy tests.

customManagers.description: Catch image: refs in tasks/*/pullrequest.yaml + release.yaml (catalog tasks consumed via uses:). Includes the leartech-gate image pin in tasks/qa-gate/.
